# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

interface AppConfig {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  featureFlags: {
    enableNewUI: boolean;
    enableBetaFeatures: boolean;
    maintenanceMode: boolean;
    enableAnalytics: boolean;
  };
  rateLimits: {
    maxRequestsPerMinute: number;
    maxRequestsPerHour: number;
  };
  allowedOrigins: string[];
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  featureFlags: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
    maintenanceMode: false,
    enableAnalytics: true,
  },
  rateLimits: {
    maxRequestsPerMinute: 60,
    maxRequestsPerHour: 1000,
  },
  allowedOrigins: ['https://example.com', 'https://app.example.com'],
};

async function getEdgeConfig(): Promise<AppConfig> {
  const connectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!connectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable not set. Using default configuration.');
    return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG };
  }

  const edgeConfigClient = createClient(connectionString);

  try {
    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, rateLimits, allowedOrigins] = await Promise.all([
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('API_KEY').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('DB_URL').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<AppConfig['featureFlags']>('featureFlags').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<AppConfig['rateLimits']>('rateLimits').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<string[]>('allowedOrigins').catch(() => null),
    ]);

    const config: AppConfig = {
      API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      featureFlags: featureFlags
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.featureFlags, ...featureFlags }
        : { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.featureFlags },
      rateLimits: rateLimits
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.rateLimits, ...rateLimits }
        : { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.rateLimits },
      allowedOrigins: allowedOrigins ?? [...DEFAULT_CONFIG.allowedOrigins],
    };

    return config;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read from Edge Config, falling back to defaults:', error);
    return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG };
  }
}

function checkOrigin(origin: string | null, allowedOrigins: string[]): boolean {
  if (!origin) return false;
  return allowedOrigins.includes(origin);
}

function sanitizeConfigForResponse(config: AppConfig): Record<string, unknown> {
  return {
    API_KEY: config.API_KEY ? `${config.API_KEY.substring(0, 8)}...` : 'not set',
    DB_URL: config.DB_URL ? config.DB_URL.replace(/\/\/.*@/, '//***:***@') : 'not set',
    featureFlags: config.featureFlags,
    rateLimits: config.rateLimits,
    allowedOrigins: config.allowedOrigins,
  };
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const startTime = Date.now();
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');

  const appConfig = await getEdgeConfig();

  const corsHeaders: Record<string, string> = {};
  if (origin && checkOrigin(origin, appConfig.allowedOrigins)) {
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Origin'] = origin;
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Methods'] = 'GET, POST, OPTIONS';
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Headers'] = 'Content-Type, Authorization';
  }

  if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return new Response(null, {
      status: 204,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  }

  if (appConfig.featureFlags.maintenanceMode && pathname !== '/health') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: 'Service Unavailable',
        message: 'The service is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.',
      }),
      {
        status: 503,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Retry-After': '300',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/health' || pathname === '/') {
    const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'ok',
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        edgeConfigConnected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
        configLoadTimeMs: elapsed,
        configuration: sanitizeConfigForResponse(appConfig),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/features') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        featureFlags: appConfig.featureFlags,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=10, stale-while-revalidate=30',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/feature-check') {
    const featureName = url.searchParams.get('name');

    if (!featureName) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: 'Bad Request',
          message: 'Query parameter "name" is required. Example: /feature-check?name=enableNewUI',
        }),
        {
          status: 400,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            ...corsHeaders,
          },
        }
      );
    }

    const featureValue =
      featureName in appConfig.featureFlags
        ? appConfig.featureFlags[featureName as keyof AppConfig['featureFlags']]
        : undefined;

    if (featureValue === undefined) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: 'Not Found',
          message: `Feature flag "${featureName}" does not exist.`,
          availableFlags: Object.keys(appConfig.featureFlags),
        }),
        {
          status: 404,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            ...corsHeaders,
          },
        }
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        feature: featureName,
        enabled: featureValue,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=10, stale-while-revalidate=30',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/data') {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
    const providedKey = authHeader?.replace('Bearer ', '');

    if (!providedKey || providedKey !== appConfig.API_KEY) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: 'Unauthorized',
          message: 'Invalid or missing API key. Provide a valid Bearer token.',
        }),
        {
          status: 401,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'WWW-Authenticate': 'Bearer',
            ...corsHeaders,
          },
        }
      );
    }

    const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        message: 'Authenticated successfully',
        data: {
          dbConnected: true,
          dbUrl: appConfig.DB_URL.replace(/\/\/.*@/, '//***:***@'),
          features: appConfig.featureFlags,
          rateLimits: appConfig.rateLimits,
        },
        processingTimeMs: elapsed,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'private, no-store',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/rate-limits') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        rateLimits: appConfig.rateLimits,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=30, stale-while-revalidate=60',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      error: 'Not Found',
      message: `Route "${pathname}" not found.`,
      availableRoutes: [
        'GET / - Health check and configuration overview',
        'GET /health - Health check',
        'GET /features - List all feature flags',
        'GET /feature-check?name=<flag> - Check a specific feature flag',
        'GET /api/data - Authenticated data endpoint (requires Bearer token)',
        'GET /rate-limits - Current rate limit configuration',
      ],
    }),
    {
      status: 404,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        ...corsHeaders,
      },
    }
  );
}
